<?php /* * This file is part of the Predis package. * * (c) 2009-2020 Daniele Alessandri * (c) 2021-2025 Till Krüss * * For the full copyright and license information, please view the LICENSE * file that was distributed with this source code. */ namespace Predis\Command\Redis\TopK; use Predis\Command\Command as RedisCommand; /** * @see https://redis.io/commands/topk.add/ * * Adds an item to the data structure. * Multiple items can be added at once. * If an item enters the Top-K list, the item which is expelled is returned. * This allows dynamic heavy-hitter detection of items being entered or expelled from Top-K list. */ class TOPKADD extends RedisCommand { public function getId() { return 'TOPK.ADD'; } }
